new_content.name: Pandæmonium: Anabaseios (Savage)
new_content.description: Adjustments made to rewards and progression: treasure coffers now always appear with no reduction in rewards, weekly restrictions on rewards and entrance removed, players can proceed to any circle, and the Echo has been added.

new_content.name: Thaleia
new_content.description: Added to Duty Roulette: Alliance Raids.

new_content.name: Fields of Glory (Shatter)
new_content.description: Adjustments to win requirements (decreased to 1,600) and data gained from defeating opposing players (increased to 8).

new_content.name: The Scions of the Seventh Dawn
new_content.description: Main scenario quest reward adjustment (Vesper Bay Aetheryte Tickets increased).

new_content.name: Back from the Wood
new_content.description: Main scenario quest reward adjustment (Vesper Bay Aetheryte Tickets increased).

new_content.name: The Black Wolf's Ultimatum
new_content.description: Main scenario quest reward adjustment (Vesper Bay Aetheryte Tickets increased).

new_content.name: Stars in the Dark
new_content.description: Resolved an issue where Temulun's animation did not display correctly during a cutscene.

new_content.name: Island Sanctuary
new_content.description: System improvement: players can now speak to the felicitous furball for hints regarding visions.

new_content.name: Khloe's Wondrous Tails
new_content.description: System adjustment: Increased Allagan tomestones of comedy reward from 50 to 300.

new_content.name: Allagan tomestones of comedy
new_content.description: System adjustment: Weekly limit increased from 450 to 900.

new_content.name: Xbox Series X|S Version Open Beta
new_content.description: Major feature: Introduction of the game on Xbox Series X|S, including SSO authentication, resolution settings, and Xbox achievement integration.
